reflection: Bulk mixed status, archive, and color now use explicit activation buttons so disabled controls cannot swallow the override click. Bulk archive is hidden unless every effective selected status is non-ongoing, preventing accidental archival of open work. No mutation occurs before Save. Verification: 35 focused frontend tests pass, production build passes, git diff --check passes.

status.comment: Integrated selection and staged bulk editing are implemented, safety-hardened, and verified; awaiting user acceptance.
